DSA: Practice arrays and strings on HackerRank (Beginner section)
Study Linked Lists - insertion, deletion, traversal with examples
Learn recursion using Factorial and Fibonacci problems
Solve 20 easy problems on LeetCode (Array tag)
Understand time complexity - O(n), O(log n), O(n^2) differences
OS: Study CPU scheduling algorithms - FCFS, SJF, Round Robin with solved examples
Understand deadlock - learn all 4 necessary conditions clearly
Learn paging and segmentation in memory management
Study semaphore and mutex for process synchronization
Practice OS GATE questions from GeeksForGeeks
DBMS: Practice SQL queries - SELECT, WHERE, JOIN, GROUP BY on W3Schools
Learn normalization - understand 1NF, 2NF, 3NF with simple examples
Study ACID properties of database transactions
Understand ER diagrams and how to convert them to tables
Practice SQL joins - INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN, RIGHT JOIN with examples
CN: Learn all 7 layers of OSI model with their functions
Understand TCP vs UDP - key differences and when each is used
Study IP addressing - classes A, B, C and basic subnetting
Learn how DNS works - domain to IP resolution process
Understand HTTP and HTTPS - how web pages are served
Aptitude: Practice percentage and profit-loss problems daily (30 minutes)
Practice number series and logical reasoning problems
Take one full mock aptitude test every week
Learn shortcut methods for quick calculation
Communication: Practice answering 20 common HR questions - Tell me about yourself, strengths, weaknesses
Read an English newspaper for 15 minutes every day
Record yourself speaking and identify areas to improve
Practice group discussion topics with friends
Learn email writing format - formal and professional emails
